transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I want to know if physical therapy is covered under my plan. It's the Bright Path Silver plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me check that for you. Yes, physical therapy is covered under Bright Path Silver, typically with a twenty dollar copay per visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Is there a specific clinic near me that's in-network?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely, Riverside Physical Therapy on Elm Street is in-network, and I can get you in with Dr. Hannah Cole this Thursday at 2 PM.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Really? That was fast. Is she taking new patients right now?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, she has that Thursday slot open specifically for new patient evaluations.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, great, let's book that then.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'll note your interest, but I'd recommend calling Riverside directly at 555-0148 to confirm and finalize since their scheduling system updates separately from ours.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Wait, so it's not actually booked?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Not yet, I just wanted to give you the best available option, so please call them to lock in that Thursday time.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Alright, I'll call them. Thanks, I guess.
